reference: Today I noticed irritation around my panty line while walking, and when I went to the bathroom, it hurt when I wiped. I felt the area that hurt, and there is a large red bump on the left side of my labia. It is swollen around the bump and sensitive to touch. I haven't shaved in a week, and this is the first time I have noticed it at all. I am also a day short of thirty-six weeks pregnant. What is this?
text: Today I noticed irritation around my pant line while walking, and when I went to the bathroom, it hurt. When I felt the area that hurt, and there is a large red bump on the left side of my labia. It is swollen around the bump and sensitive to touch. I haven't shaved in a week, and this is the first time I have noticed it at all. I am also a day short of thirty-six weeks pregnant. What is this?
